scripts.check: pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test
scripts.test: vitest run --exclude browser-tests/**/*.spec.ts --exclude tests/abuse-control.integration.test.ts --exclude tests/audit-events.integration.test.ts --exclude tests/audit-integrity.integration.test.ts --exclude tests/audited-http.integration.test.ts --exclude tests/dynamic-private-beta-flow.integration.test.ts --exclude tests/growful-request-quota.integration.test.ts --exclude tests/manage-abuse.integration.test.ts --exclude tests/manage-invites.integration.test.ts --exclude tests/manage-status.integration.test.ts --exclude tests/postgres-oauth-store.integration.test.ts --exclude tests/oauth-state-retention.integration.test.ts --exclude tests/privacy-deletion.integration.test.ts --exclude tests/privacy-deletion-race.integration.test.ts --exclude tests/private-beta-invite-access.integration.test.ts --exclude tests/private-beta-invite-schema.integration.test.ts --exclude tests/private-beta-oauth-generation.integration.test.ts --exclude tests/private-beta-oauth-revocation-race.integration.test.ts --exclude tests/private-beta-policy-revocation.integration.test.ts --exclude tests/readiness.integration.test.ts --exclude tests/smartthings-rate-limit-backoff.integration.test.ts
scripts.test:integration: vitest run --no-file-parallelism tests/abuse-control.integration.test.ts tests/audit-events.integration.test.ts tests/audit-integrity.integration.test.ts tests/audited-http.integration.test.ts tests/dynamic-private-beta-flow.integration.test.ts tests/growful-request-quota.integration.test.ts tests/manage-abuse.integration.test.ts tests/manage-invites.integration.test.ts tests/manage-status.integration.test.ts tests/postgres-oauth-store.integration.test.ts tests/oauth-state-retention.integration.test.ts tests/privacy-deletion.integration.test.ts tests/privacy-deletion-race.integration.test.ts tests/private-beta-invite-access.integration.test.ts tests/private-beta-invite-schema.integration.test.ts tests/private-beta-oauth-generation.integration.test.ts tests/private-beta-oauth-revocation-race.integration.test.ts tests/private-beta-policy-revocation.integration.test.ts tests/readiness.integration.test.ts tests/smartthings-rate-limit-backoff.integration.test.ts
